texts.content:
From: Student Services
To: All Students
Subject: Extended Library Hours During Finals

The university library will extend its hours for the final exam period. Starting December 10, the main reading room will be open 24 hours a day through December 20. Group study rooms must be reserved online at least two hours in advance.

Please note that the quiet study floors will maintain regular hours (8 AM – 10 PM). Food and drinks are permitted only in designated areas on the ground floor.

questions.stem: According to the email, which area of the library will be open 24 hours?
options: A. The group study rooms
B. The quiet study floors
C. The main reading room
D. The ground floor cafe area
questions.explanation: The email states that 'the main reading room will be open 24 hours a day.'

questions.stem: What can be inferred about group study rooms during finals?
options: A. They are available on a first-come, first-served basis
B. They require advance online reservation
C. They are closed during the extended hours period
D. They are only available to graduate students
questions.explanation: The email states that group study rooms 'must be reserved online at least two hours in advance.'

questions.stem: The word 'designated' in the email is closest in meaning to:
options: A. restricted
B. assigned
C. hidden
D. comfortable
questions.explanation: 'Designated' means specifically assigned or marked for a particular purpose.

texts.content:
Campus Cafe – Winter Break Schedule

Dec 15–Dec 30: Reduced hours (7 AM – 3 PM)
Jan 2: Resume normal hours (6:30 AM – 8 PM)

The cafe will be completely closed on Dec 24, 25, and 31.

During reduced hours, only grab-and-go items and coffee will be available. The hot breakfast menu returns January 2.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the cafe notice?
options: A. To announce a permanent closure
B. To inform customers of temporary schedule changes
C. To introduce a new winter menu
D. To recruit temporary holiday staff
questions.explanation: The notice informs customers about reduced hours, closure dates, and limited menu options during the winter break.

questions.stem: Which statement about the cafe is true during the reduced hours period?
options: A. The full breakfast menu is available all day
B. Hot meals can be ordered from the regular menu
C. Only grab-and-go items and coffee are served
D. The cafe opens at 6:30 AM as usual
questions.explanation: The notice explicitly states that 'only grab-and-go items and coffee will be available' during reduced hours.

questions.stem: On which date will both the library and the cafe be operating on modified schedules?
options: A. December 10
B. December 15
C. December 25
D. January 2
questions.explanation: On December 15, the library is in its extended hours period (Dec 10–20) and the cafe begins reduced hours (Dec 15–30).
